title: And then we'll be okay
description: Any resemblance to actual deities living or dead is purely metaphysical.
note: If only everyone could put their ambitions and hearts together. We're a lost case and the universe won't even remember us!

title: This song has no instruments in it
description: As far as I'm aware, this is the first-ever song composed using EQ as the primary "instrument"... and despite having only 24 eq points to program, I've never in my life missed using a MIDI controller as much as I have during these last two weeks😩
note: Wonder how many hours he'd put into it! Neatly done. I've once tried creating music from just a single 808 synth, but creating music out of pink noise is a whole new level of creativity.

title: AI Agent Bankrupted Their Operator While Trying to Scan DN42 - Lan Tian @ Blog
description: An AI agent tried to join the DN42 hobbyist network to perform a network scan, and bankrupted its operator with a $6531.30 AWS bill, to the extent that they are begging for donations from the DN42 community.
note: A good read in a while in these hard times. Not sure what it feels like thou, but it's a well-written humorous piece from start to end.
